context: Tests whether the agent catches PaperKit async rendering, HDR property, forward compatibility, and insertion controller availability issues.

checklist.name: Async draw
checklist.description: Flags that PaperMarkup.draw(in:frame:options:) is async and must be awaited before returning or encoding a thumbnail.

checklist.name: Render path
checklist.description: Provides or describes an awaited render path, such as drawing into a bitmap CGContext and creating image data only after await completes.

checklist.name: Compatibility check
checklist.description: Checks loaded markup against the supported FeatureSet or handles MarkupError.incompatibleFormatTooNew before offering editing.

checklist.name: Controller availability
checklist.description: States that MarkupEditViewController is available on iOS, iPadOS, Mac Catalyst, and visionOS, while MarkupToolbarViewController covers macOS and Mac Catalyst toolbar-style UI.

checklist.name: No sync workaround
checklist.description: Does not recommend blocking the main thread or using a synchronous wrapper around PaperMarkup.dataRepresentation() or draw(in:frame:options:).
